content: Exit/position-management UX in retail tools: OptionStrat = color-coded P&L-over-time/IV payoff matrices + probability (PoP, prob-touch) to plan exit timing/theta capture. thinkorswim Position Statement = right-click a position -> close/analyze/roll by leg or as a spread; strategy studies label actions LX/SX/LE/SE (named exit signals). Norm = show WHY (payoff/greeks/prob) alongside the suggested action; exit as an action verb attached to the position, roll offered inline as an adjustment, not a separate flow.
